# Convert Google Analytics 4 data into EASY reports (in a few clicks)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-11-06 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 280

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Struggling to understand Google Analytics 4 (GA4) reports?

Then you’re not alone! In fact, understanding GA4 reports is so
challenging that many users even asked me if I could recommend a
better alternative to Google Analytics.

Unfortunately, most alternatives are too expensive because they
are charged based on the number of website visitors.

Now, what if I told you that you don’t need an alternative? All
you need is to transform your existing Google Analytics 4 data
into easy-to-understand reports.

👉 Introducing OnePageGA: Google Analytics Reports Made Easy 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZlMRrhZ288AlGFOP-a8c3XYWEIy2LE3D9Wb78ZJxpV4 )
👈

********************************
Here's Why You'll Love OnePageGA
********************************

OnePageGA is built for website owners who want to understand
their website data without getting lost in GA4's maze.

With OnePageGA, you can:

* See Your Website at a Glance: All your important stats like
visits, time spent on site, bounce rate, and more are displayed
clearly. No more clicking around forever!
* Get the Info You Need, Fast: OnePageGA gives you the right data
at the right time. You can easily filter and compare your
website's performance over different time periods.
* Create Your Own Reports: You can select which metrics to
include in your reports. Choose from options like new visitors,
returning visitors, average order value, and more.
* Track Sales & Conversions: Easily see how your online store is
doing with special reports on sales, conversions, and other
important actions. You can even create custom reports to follow
your customer's journey from start to finish.

To learn more about what this helpful tool can do, see my
detailed OnePageGA announcement 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZlMRrhZ288AlGFOP-a8c3XYWEIy2LE3D9Wb78ZJxpV4 )
.

********************
Try OnePageGA Today!
********************

Ready to ditch the GA4 headache and get clear website insights?

Start your free 14-day OnePageGA trial today - no credit card
required! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZlMRrhZ288AlGFOP-a8c3XYWEIy2LE3D9Wb78ZJxpV4 )


Test it out and let us know what you think. We’re always looking
for ways to make OnePageGA even better!

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi,
Founder of WPBeginner
